/* References */ Category:People of the Iran–Israel War

Terminology fix; shorter and simplified names are easier to understand, remember, and communicate, especially in fast-paced media reporting, academic writing, and diplomatic discourse. Also, the full official name includes the political designation ("Islamic Republic"), which may carry ideological connotations. A simplified version ("Iranian Armed Forces") allows for a more neutral reference, useful in non-political contexts.
/* top */ Removing honorific (see MOS:ISLAM); keeping in intro; style
